privileged_info_summary: No explicit metadata field found in task.json. The task operates on a Drupal Commerce environment (drupal_commerce_env) that uses synthetically generated product data created by seed_products.php, which creates 12 products with real product names (Sony WH-1000XM5, Apple MacBook Air M2, Samsung QLED TV, etc.) but synthetic records. The task itself creates a Drupal Views-based 'Related Products' block that should display 3 random products while excluding the current product on product detail pages. No metadata claims were found to verify.
